heading: Omitted
label: 380a, 380b Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 380a, acts , ; , , authorized purchases by Bureau of Reclamation without compliance with section 16 of former Title 41, Public Contracts.Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 418, § 1353 Stat. 1197Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 851, § 454 Stat. 1111Section 380b, , , which authorized transfer of surplus aircraft parts and equipment to Bureau of Reclamation was from the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1953, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act July 9, 1952, ch. 597, title I66 Stat. 453A prior section 380b, , , contained provisions similar to section 380b.act Aug. 31, 1951, ch. 375, title I65 Stat. 257
